prompt: Using the FIRST reference image as the base scroll icon, keep the rolled parchment scroll, brown leather strap, copper buckle, tilted angle, colors, lighting, and transparent background COMPLETELY UNCHANGED. ONLY replace the small 'EXP' text on the strap with a MUCH LARGER, MUCH BOLDER 'EXP' text — approximately 1.5x the previous size — matching the text style shown in the SECOND reference image: huge chunky uppercase 'EXP' letters in saturated golden-yellow gradient fill (bright yellow highlight on top fading to rich orange-gold at bottom), with a THICK dark brown or black outer outline, clear inner highlights on each letter for a shiny 3D embossed chunky game-style look. The 'EXP' should be so large that it CLEARLY EXTENDS BEYOND the leather strap on both top and bottom edges, overlapping slightly onto the yellow parchment above and below the strap — this is intentional and desired, makes the text the dominant focal point of the icon. Horizontal placement: centered on the strap's front face. Each letter should occupy roughly equal width, text should be condensed enough to all three letters fit horizontally across the strap but vertically OVERSIZED so the letters clearly stick out above and below the strap. Maintain the same slight perspective tilt as the strap. ONE SINGLE scroll icon, transparent background, no extra elements, no watermark, no text besides 'EXP'.
